summary: Security audit of sanitized showcase gallery skill. Checked for all categories of sensitive information: localhost URLs, /root/ paths, internal IPs, API key variable names, credentials.

checks.note: One mention of 'http://localhost' on line 1024 in prose text ('cookies между file:// и http://localhost') — this is a generic protocol reference, NOT a localhost:PORT URL. The grep pattern 'localhost:' correctly does NOT match it because there is no colon-port after 'localhost'. Safe.

api.hydraai.ru (public API endpoint), noxonbot.wpmix.net (public showcase URL), d999999999.habab.ru (public demo URL). These are public-facing URLs, not internal infrastructure — acceptable in a public repo.
noxonbot-webchat appears in bash examples. This is an operational detail but not a security concern — no sensitive data exposed.
